events.title: Morning Movement Routine
events.subtitle: Neurological Wake-Up & Movement Priming
events.description: Designed to complement the nightly stretch routine and daily 2+ mile walk. No overlap with the nightly routine — this does different work. Sequence is non-negotiable: neurological activation before movement, postural chain top-and-bottom before loading, joint preparation before hanging. The glutes must fire before the walk.

exercises.name: Glute Squeeze Holds
exercises.notes: Lying flat on your back, immediately upon getting up. Pure isometric — no movement, no bridging. Isolate the contraction; hamstrings and lower back stay quiet. If they engage first, the glutes are still inhibited.

exercises.name: Chin Tucks Against Wall
exercises.notes: Back against wall, heels 2–3 inches out. Chin straight back — not down — until skull contacts wall. Movement is horizontal. Feel mild contraction at base of skull, not a stretch.

exercises.name: Deep Squat
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Pause 2–3 sec at bottom. Heels flat. Hands in prayer to pry knees out. Bottom position should feel like arriving somewhere, not surviving somewhere.

exercises.name: Dive Bomber Push-Ups
exercises.notes: Start in downward dog. Sweep chest forward and down in an arc, finish hips low chest up. Reverse the arc. Engage anterior core through the forward sweep — do not let lower back go slack.

exercises.name: Hangboard Warm-Up
exercises.notes: 4–5/10 intensity. Almost nothing. Tendon priming only — increasing blood flow to pulleys, not training them.

exercises.name: Hangboard Main Block
exercises.notes: 5–6/10 intensity. No full crimp. No minimum edges. No two-finger pockets. If forearms feel pumped, edges were too small.

events.title: Upper Body Strength
events.subtitle: Push Focus — Chest & Shoulders
events.description: Heavy push day. Compound pressing to build raw strength in chest, shoulders, and triceps. Keep rest periods strict — 90 seconds between working sets. Goal today is to add 5 lbs to last week's bench.

warmup.name: Band Pull-Aparts
warmup.notes: Keep arms straight, squeeze shoulder blades.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Feet flat, arch controlled, bar to lower chest.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.notes: Brace core hard, press through the ceiling.

exercises.name: Cable Chest Fly
exercises.notes: Full stretch at the bottom, squeeze at the top.

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.notes: Shoulder health non-negotiable — don't skip.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Core block first — sequence is non-negotiable. Thoracic work precedes psoas release so the pelvis receives the benefit of a more mobile thoracic spine. Upper add-on hits climbing-critical soft tissue: forearm extensors and flexors, lat internal rotation bias, posterior capsule, and pec minor.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment at mid-thoracic. Hips stay on ground. Hands clasped behind head, elbows in. Let gravity extend you — do not force. Work 3–4 vertebral levels.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Low lunge, rear knee down. Squeeze rear glute hard to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking. Glute-driven tilt targets psoas; passive sinking misses it entirely.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Both shins at 90°. Hinge forward over front leg with flat back — spine lengthening, not rounding. Addresses hip capsule restriction, distinct from flexor tightness.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hands in prayer to pry knees out. Hang passively at the bottom.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: On back, cross ankle above opposite knee. Pull bottom leg toward chest. Maintain flexed ankle to protect the knee joint.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. In cow, emphasize thoracic extension — lumbar extension is the default and adds nothing. Use this to close the core block.

exercises.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch — Palms-Down Gorilla
exercises.notes: Hands flat on floor, fingers pointing back toward knees, arms straight. Lean back slowly. Targets forearm extensors — equally loaded on crimps and slopers as the flexors.

exercises.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch — Palm-Up Prayer
exercises.notes: Palms together in prayer, elbows out. Then reverse: backs of hands together, fingers pointing down. Hold the sticky spots in the finger flexor tendons.

exercises.name: Lat Doorframe Stretch
exercises.notes: Grab doorframe above head height. Step through, let bodyweight traction the lat. Feel it deep along the side of the torso — not in the shoulder. Counters internal rotation bias from climbing volume.

exercises.name: Posterior Rotator Cuff Stretch
exercises.notes: Lie on side, elbow at shoulder height bent 90°. Other hand slowly rotates forearm toward floor. No forcing. Posterior capsule tightening is the most common overuse pattern in climbers.

exercises.name: Chest Opener / Pec Stretch
exercises.notes: Doorframe at 90°, lean through. Or foam roller lengthwise along spine, arms in T. Pec minor is the driver of anterior shoulder rounding in climbers.

events.title: Climbing Session
events.subtitle: Technique & Project Work
events.description: Tuesday evenings at the gym. Warm up on slabs and easy traversing, then move into your 5.11 project. Focus on footwork precision and reading sequences before pulling on. Goal this session: link the crux section on the overhang problem.

warmup.name: Easy Traversing
warmup.notes: Slab and vertical only. No overhang until warm.

warmup.name: Finger Flexor Warm-Up
warmup.notes: Half-crimp position. Stop if anything pops.

exercises.name: 5.9 Routes — Volume Laps
exercises.notes: Focus on quiet feet and straight arms.

exercises.name: 5.10b/c Routes
exercises.notes: Read the route from the ground before starting.

exercises.name: 5.11a Project
exercises.notes: Rest 10+ min between attempts. Film one attempt for review.

exercises.name: Hangboard — Max Hangs
exercises.notes: Half-crimp, 20mm edge.

cooldown.name: Antagonist Finger Extensions
cooldown.notes: Rubber band. Injury prevention — don't skip.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower
events.subtitle: Core Block + Hamstrings, Adductors & Ankle
events.description: Lower nights hit the ski chain. Hamstrings, adductors, ankle dorsiflexion, and quad length. Core block first — always. Bent-knee hamstring hinge removes the sciatic nerve from the equation and isolates the muscle belly.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment at mid-thoracic. Hips stay on ground. Hands clasped behind head, elbows in. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute hard to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking. Glute-driven tilt targets psoas; passive sinking misses it.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Both shins at 90°. Hinge forward with flat back — spine lengthens, not rounds.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hands in prayer. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: On back, cross ankle above opposite knee. Pull bottom leg toward chest. Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot on elevated surface, leg slightly bent. Hinge at the hip — not rounding the spine. Bent knee isolates the muscle belly, removes sciatic nerve.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, one knee on ground, shift laterally. Critical for high steps and heel hooks in climbing, wide-stance couloir work skiing.

exercises.name: Calf / Ankle Dorsiflexion Stretch
exercises.notes: Facing wall, toes propped, lean shin forward. Insufficient dorsiflexion shifts weight back in ski boot and burns quads prematurely.

exercises.name: Kneeling Quad / Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.notes: Kneeling lunge, rear knee down. Grab rear ankle. Do NOT posteriorly tilt — let hips settle naturally. Goal is quad length, not hip flexor retraining.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Spine/Hip nights go deeper into thoracic rotation and hip external rotation. Thread-the-needle targets the most limited and most important movement plane for climbing. Pigeon drives ski turn initiation and reduces compensatory knee torque.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment, mid-thoracic. Hips on ground. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge. Spine lengthens.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow. 5 sec each direction.

exercises.name: Thread-the-Needle
exercises.notes: Quadruped. Thread one arm under body, rotate, shoulder rests on ground. Look up at ceiling on open side. Thoracic transverse rotation — allows torso to flag and counter-rotate on steep terrain.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
exercises.notes: On back, one knee drawn across body. Opposite shoulder stays flat. Look away from knee. Use prop under knee if spine won't relax. Passive — not a strength exercise.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
exercises.notes: Full pigeon: front shin on ground, torso can fold forward. Hip external rotation and glute depth. Drives ski turn initiation, reduces medial knee stress.

exercises.name: Child's Pose with Lateral Reach
exercises.notes: Kneel back to heels, walk hands to one side. Opens lat and intercostal — the space between ribs that tightens under pack weight and sustained vertical pulling.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Second upper session of the week. Forearm extensor and flexor balance reduces tendinopathy risk. Posterior capsule is the most neglected soft tissue in the climbing upper body.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Mid-thoracic, segment by segment. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute squeeze to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch — Palms-Down Gorilla
exercises.notes: Hands flat on floor, fingers back toward knees. Lean back. Targets forearm extensors.

exercises.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch — Palm-Up Prayer
exercises.notes: Prayer position, elbows out. Reverse: backs of hands together. Hold the sticky spots.

exercises.name: Lat Doorframe Stretch
exercises.notes: Feel it deep along torso, not in shoulder. Counters internal rotation bias from climbing.

exercises.name: Posterior Rotator Cuff Stretch
exercises.notes: Lie on side, elbow at shoulder height. Rotate forearm toward floor slowly. No forcing.

exercises.name: Chest Opener / Pec Stretch
exercises.notes: Doorframe at 90° or foam roller lengthwise. Pec minor is the driver of anterior shoulder rounding.

events.title: Climbing Session
events.subtitle: Volume Day — Movement Quality
events.description: Volume and movement quality day. No projecting — focus on body positioning and reading routes. Every session that prioritizes technique over sending is an investment.

warmup.name: Easy Traversing
warmup.notes: Footwork only. Move feet three times for every hand move.

exercises.name: 5.9 Routes — Footwork Drills
exercises.notes: One hand behind back on easy sections.

exercises.name: 5.10a/b Routes — Volume
exercises.notes: No falls. Downclimb when possible.

exercises.name: 5.10d Route — Onsight Attempt
exercises.notes: Read from the ground. Commit to sequences.

exercises.name: Circuit Board — Pull Strength
exercises.notes: Bent-arm pulling. Feet on the board.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower
events.subtitle: Core Block + Hamstrings, Adductors & Ankle
events.description: Second lower session of the week. Without adequate ankle dorsiflexion, the ski boot compensates — shortens effective leverage and burns out quads faster. Daily volume is required to move restricted ankle ROM.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Mid-thoracic, segment by segment.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute squeeze BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot elevated, leg slightly bent. Hinge at hip. Bent knee isolates muscle belly.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally. Adductors consistently undertrained and overly tight in climbers.

exercises.name: Calf / Ankle Dorsiflexion Stretch
exercises.notes: Toes propped against wall, lean shin forward.

exercises.name: Kneeling Quad / Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.notes: Do NOT posteriorly tilt. Let hips settle naturally. Goal is quad length.

events.title: Pull Day
events.subtitle: Back & Biceps
events.description: Weekend morning lift. Pull day targets the back and biceps. After two climbing sessions, the lats are already primed. Use that mind-muscle connection and go heavier than you think you can.

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-Ups
exercises.notes: Dead hang start, chin over bar.

exercises.name: Barbell Row
exercises.notes: Hinge at 45°, row to lower sternum.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Second spine/hip session of the week. Pigeon pose is distinct from the flexor work in the psoas lunge — it targets external hip rotation specifically, which drives ski turn initiation.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute-driven posterior tilt BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Thread-the-Needle
exercises.notes: Quadruped. Thread arm under, shoulder to ground. Look up on open side.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
exercises.notes: Opposite shoulder stays flat. Look away from knee. Passive.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
exercises.notes: Front shin on ground. Torso can fold forward over it. External hip rotation — distinct from psoas lunge.

exercises.name: Child's Pose with Lateral Reach
exercises.notes: Walk hands to one side. Targets ribs that tighten under pack weight.

events.subtitle: Core Block + 2 Lower Stretches
events.description: Sunday is a shortened session — intentional programming, not a concession. After 6 consecutive nights of structured stretching, reduced load is part of the plan. Core block plus the two most critical lower stretches only.

exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat

events.description: Tuesday project session. Goal: send the 5.11a. Come in rested and mentally sharp. Visualize the crux sequence before you rope up. Rest fully between attempts.

exercises.name: 5.11a Project — Send Attempt

exercises.name: Hangboard — Repeaters

events.subtitle: Core Block + Hamstrings, Adductors & Ankle
events.description: Lower nights hit the ski chain. Hamstrings, adductors, ankle dorsiflexion, and quad length. Core block first — always. Bent-knee hamstring hinge removes the sciatic nerve from the equation and isolates the muscle belly.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment at mid-thoracic. Hips stay on ground. Hands clasped behind head, elbows in. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute hard to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking. Glute-driven tilt targets psoas; passive sinking misses it.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Both shins at 90°. Hinge forward with flat back — spine lengthens, not rounds.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hands in prayer. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: On back, cross ankle above opposite knee. Pull bottom leg toward chest. Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot on elevated surface, leg slightly bent. Hinge at the hip — not rounding the spine. Bent knee isolates the muscle belly, removes sciatic nerve.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, one knee on ground, shift laterally. Critical for high steps and heel hooks in climbing, wide-stance couloir work skiing.

exercises.name: Calf / Ankle Dorsiflexion Stretch
exercises.notes: Facing wall, toes propped, lean shin forward. Insufficient dorsiflexion shifts weight back in ski boot and burns quads prematurely.

exercises.name: Kneeling Quad / Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.notes: Kneeling lunge, rear knee down. Grab rear ankle. Do NOT posteriorly tilt — let hips settle naturally. Goal is quad length, not hip flexor retraining.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Spine/Hip nights go deeper into thoracic rotation and hip external rotation. Thread-the-needle targets the most limited and most important movement plane for climbing. Pigeon drives ski turn initiation and reduces compensatory knee torque.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment, mid-thoracic. Hips on ground. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge. Spine lengthens.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow. 5 sec each direction.

exercises.name: Thread-the-Needle
exercises.notes: Quadruped. Thread one arm under body, rotate, shoulder rests on ground. Look up at ceiling on open side. Thoracic transverse rotation — allows torso to flag and counter-rotate on steep terrain.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
exercises.notes: On back, one knee drawn across body. Opposite shoulder stays flat. Look away from knee. Use prop under knee if spine won't relax. Passive — not a strength exercise.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
exercises.notes: Full pigeon: front shin on ground, torso can fold forward. Hip external rotation and glute depth. Drives ski turn initiation, reduces medial knee stress.

exercises.name: Child's Pose with Lateral Reach
exercises.notes: Kneel back to heels, walk hands to one side. Opens lat and intercostal — the space between ribs that tightens under pack weight and sustained vertical pulling.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Second upper session of the week. Forearm extensor and flexor balance reduces tendinopathy risk. Posterior capsule is the most neglected soft tissue in the climbing upper body.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch

exercises.name: Cat-Cow

exercises.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch — Palms-Down Gorilla
exercises.notes: Hands flat on floor, fingers back toward knees. Lean back. Targets forearm extensors.

exercises.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch — Palm-Up Prayer
exercises.notes: Prayer position, elbows out. Reverse: backs of hands together. Hold the sticky spots.

exercises.name: Lat Doorframe Stretch
exercises.notes: Feel it deep along torso, not in shoulder. Counters internal rotation bias from climbing.

exercises.name: Posterior Rotator Cuff Stretch

exercises.name: Chest Opener / Pec Stretch

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally. Adductors consistently undertrained and overly tight in climbers.

exercises.name: Calf / Ankle Dorsiflexion Stretch

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch

exercises.name: Cat-Cow

exercises.name: Thread-the-Needle
exercises.notes: Quadruped. Thread arm under, shoulder to ground. Look up on open side.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
exercises.notes: Opposite shoulder stays flat. Look away from knee. Passive.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose

exercises.name: Child's Pose with Lateral Reach
exercises.notes: Walk hands to one side. Targets ribs that tighten under pack weight.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower (Short)
events.subtitle: Core Block + 2 Lower Stretches
events.description: Sunday is a shortened session — intentional programming, not a concession. After 6 consecutive nights of structured stretching, reduced load is part of the plan. Core block plus the two most critical lower stretches only.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute-driven posterior tilt BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Close the core block.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot elevated. Hinge at hip, not spine.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Core block first — sequence is non-negotiable. Thoracic work precedes psoas release so the pelvis receives the benefit of a more mobile thoracic spine. Upper add-on hits climbing-critical soft tissue: forearm extensors and flexors, lat internal rotation bias, posterior capsule, and pec minor.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment at mid-thoracic. Hips stay on ground. Hands clasped behind head, elbows in. Let gravity extend you — do not force. Work 3–4 vertebral levels.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Low lunge, rear knee down. Squeeze rear glute hard to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking. Glute-driven tilt targets psoas; passive sinking misses it entirely.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Both shins at 90°. Hinge forward over front leg with flat back — spine lengthening, not rounding. Addresses hip capsule restriction, distinct from flexor tightness.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hands in prayer to pry knees out. Hang passively at the bottom.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: On back, cross ankle above opposite knee. Pull bottom leg toward chest. Maintain flexed ankle to protect the knee joint.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. In cow, emphasize thoracic extension — lumbar extension is the default and adds nothing. Use this to close the core block.

exercises.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch — Palms-Down Gorilla
exercises.notes: Hands flat on floor, fingers pointing back toward knees, arms straight. Lean back slowly. Targets forearm extensors — equally loaded on crimps and slopers as the flexors.

exercises.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch — Palm-Up Prayer
exercises.notes: Palms together in prayer, elbows out. Then reverse: backs of hands together, fingers pointing down. Hold the sticky spots in the finger flexor tendons.

exercises.name: Lat Doorframe Stretch
exercises.notes: Grab doorframe above head height. Step through, let bodyweight traction the lat. Feel it deep along the side of the torso — not in the shoulder. Counters internal rotation bias from climbing volume.

exercises.name: Posterior Rotator Cuff Stretch
exercises.notes: Lie on side, elbow at shoulder height bent 90°. Other hand slowly rotates forearm toward floor. No forcing. Posterior capsule tightening is the most common overuse pattern in climbers.

exercises.name: Chest Opener / Pec Stretch
exercises.notes: Doorframe at 90°, lean through. Or foam roller lengthwise along spine, arms in T. Pec minor is the driver of anterior shoulder rounding in climbers.

events.subtitle: Core Block + Hamstrings, Adductors & Ankle

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
exercises.notes: Full pigeon: front shin on ground, torso can fold forward. Hip external rotation and glute depth. Drives ski turn initiation, reduces medial knee stress.

exercises.name: Child's Pose with Lateral Reach
exercises.notes: Kneel back to heels, walk hands to one side. Opens lat and intercostal — the space between ribs that tightens under pack weight and sustained vertical pulling.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Second upper session of the week. Forearm extensor and flexor balance reduces tendinopathy risk. Posterior capsule is the most neglected soft tissue in the climbing upper body.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Mid-thoracic, segment by segment. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute squeeze to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch — Palms-Down Gorilla
exercises.notes: Hands flat on floor, fingers back toward knees. Lean back. Targets forearm extensors.

exercises.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch — Palm-Up Prayer
exercises.notes: Prayer position, elbows out. Reverse: backs of hands together. Hold the sticky spots.

exercises.name: Lat Doorframe Stretch
exercises.notes: Feel it deep along torso, not in shoulder. Counters internal rotation bias from climbing.

exercises.name: Posterior Rotator Cuff Stretch
exercises.notes: Lie on side, elbow at shoulder height. Rotate forearm toward floor slowly. No forcing.

exercises.name: Chest Opener / Pec Stretch
exercises.notes: Doorframe at 90° or foam roller lengthwise. Pec minor is the driver of anterior shoulder rounding.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower
events.subtitle: Core Block + Hamstrings, Adductors & Ankle
events.description: Second lower session of the week. Without adequate ankle dorsiflexion, the ski boot compensates — shortens effective leverage and burns out quads faster. Daily volume is required to move restricted ankle ROM.

exercises.notes: Mid-thoracic, segment by segment.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute squeeze BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot elevated, leg slightly bent. Hinge at hip. Bent knee isolates muscle belly.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally. Adductors consistently undertrained and overly tight in climbers.

exercises.name: Calf / Ankle Dorsiflexion Stretch
exercises.notes: Toes propped against wall, lean shin forward.

exercises.name: Kneeling Quad / Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.notes: Do NOT posteriorly tilt. Let hips settle naturally. Goal is quad length.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Second spine/hip session of the week. Pigeon pose is distinct from the flexor work in the psoas lunge — it targets external hip rotation specifically, which drives ski turn initiation.

exercises.notes: Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute-driven posterior tilt BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Thread-the-Needle
exercises.notes: Quadruped. Thread arm under, shoulder to ground. Look up on open side.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
exercises.notes: Opposite shoulder stays flat. Look away from knee. Passive.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
exercises.notes: Front shin on ground. Torso can fold forward over it. External hip rotation — distinct from psoas lunge.

exercises.name: Child's Pose with Lateral Reach
exercises.notes: Walk hands to one side. Targets ribs that tighten under pack weight.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower (Short)
events.subtitle: Core Block + 2 Lower Stretches
events.description: Sunday is a shortened session — intentional programming, not a concession. After 6 consecutive nights of structured stretching, reduced load is part of the plan. Core block plus the two most critical lower stretches only.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute-driven posterior tilt BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Close the core block.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot elevated. Hinge at hip, not spine.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Core block first — sequence is non-negotiable. Thoracic work precedes psoas release so the pelvis receives the benefit of a more mobile thoracic spine. Upper add-on hits climbing-critical soft tissue: forearm extensors and flexors, lat internal rotation bias, posterior capsule, and pec minor.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment at mid-thoracic. Hips stay on ground. Hands clasped behind head, elbows in. Let gravity extend you — do not force. Work 3–4 vertebral levels.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Low lunge, rear knee down. Squeeze rear glute hard to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking. Glute-driven tilt targets psoas; passive sinking misses it entirely.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Both shins at 90°. Hinge forward over front leg with flat back — spine lengthening, not rounding. Addresses hip capsule restriction, distinct from flexor tightness.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hands in prayer to pry knees out. Hang passively at the bottom.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: On back, cross ankle above opposite knee. Pull bottom leg toward chest. Maintain flexed ankle to protect the knee joint.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. In cow, emphasize thoracic extension — lumbar extension is the default and adds nothing. Use this to close the core block.

exercises.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch — Palms-Down Gorilla
exercises.notes: Hands flat on floor, fingers pointing back toward knees, arms straight. Lean back slowly. Targets forearm extensors — equally loaded on crimps and slopers as the flexors.

exercises.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch — Palm-Up Prayer
exercises.notes: Palms together in prayer, elbows out. Then reverse: backs of hands together, fingers pointing down. Hold the sticky spots in the finger flexor tendons.

exercises.name: Lat Doorframe Stretch
exercises.notes: Grab doorframe above head height. Step through, let bodyweight traction the lat. Feel it deep along the side of the torso — not in the shoulder. Counters internal rotation bias from climbing volume.

exercises.name: Posterior Rotator Cuff Stretch
exercises.notes: Lie on side, elbow at shoulder height bent 90°. Other hand slowly rotates forearm toward floor. No forcing. Posterior capsule tightening is the most common overuse pattern in climbers.

exercises.name: Chest Opener / Pec Stretch
exercises.notes: Doorframe at 90°, lean through. Or foam roller lengthwise along spine, arms in T. Pec minor is the driver of anterior shoulder rounding in climbers.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower
events.subtitle: Core Block + Hamstrings, Adductors & Ankle
events.description: Lower nights hit the ski chain. Hamstrings, adductors, ankle dorsiflexion, and quad length. Core block first — always. Bent-knee hamstring hinge removes the sciatic nerve from the equation and isolates the muscle belly.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment at mid-thoracic. Hips stay on ground. Hands clasped behind head, elbows in. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute hard to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking. Glute-driven tilt targets psoas; passive sinking misses it.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Both shins at 90°. Hinge forward with flat back — spine lengthens, not rounds.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hands in prayer. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: On back, cross ankle above opposite knee. Pull bottom leg toward chest. Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot on elevated surface, leg slightly bent. Hinge at the hip — not rounding the spine. Bent knee isolates the muscle belly, removes sciatic nerve.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, one knee on ground, shift laterally. Critical for high steps and heel hooks in climbing, wide-stance couloir work skiing.

exercises.name: Calf / Ankle Dorsiflexion Stretch
exercises.notes: Facing wall, toes propped, lean shin forward. Insufficient dorsiflexion shifts weight back in ski boot and burns quads prematurely.

exercises.name: Kneeling Quad / Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.notes: Kneeling lunge, rear knee down. Grab rear ankle. Do NOT posteriorly tilt — let hips settle naturally. Goal is quad length, not hip flexor retraining.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Spine/Hip nights go deeper into thoracic rotation and hip external rotation. Thread-the-needle targets the most limited and most important movement plane for climbing. Pigeon drives ski turn initiation and reduces compensatory knee torque.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment, mid-thoracic. Hips on ground. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge. Spine lengthens.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow. 5 sec each direction.

exercises.name: Thread-the-Needle
exercises.notes: Quadruped. Thread one arm under body, rotate, shoulder rests on ground. Look up at ceiling on open side. Thoracic transverse rotation — allows torso to flag and counter-rotate on steep terrain.

exercises.notes: Do NOT posteriorly tilt. Let hips settle naturally. Goal is quad length.

events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Second spine/hip session of the week. Pigeon pose is distinct from the flexor work in the psoas lunge — it targets external hip rotation specifically, which drives ski turn initiation.

exercises.name: Thread-the-Needle
exercises.notes: Quadruped. Thread arm under, shoulder to ground. Look up on open side.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
exercises.notes: Opposite shoulder stays flat. Look away from knee. Passive.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
exercises.notes: Front shin on ground. Torso can fold forward over it. External hip rotation — distinct from psoas lunge.

exercises.name: Child's Pose with Lateral Reach

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower (Short)
events.subtitle: Core Block + 2 Lower Stretches
events.description: Sunday is a shortened session — intentional programming, not a concession. After 6 consecutive nights of structured stretching, reduced load is part of the plan. Core block plus the two most critical lower stretches only.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute-driven posterior tilt BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Close the core block.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot elevated. Hinge at hip, not spine.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Core block first — sequence is non-negotiable. Thoracic work precedes psoas release so the pelvis receives the benefit of a more mobile thoracic spine. Upper add-on hits climbing-critical soft tissue: forearm extensors and flexors, lat internal rotation bias, posterior capsule, and pec minor.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment at mid-thoracic. Hips stay on ground. Hands clasped behind head, elbows in. Let gravity extend you — do not force. Work 3–4 vertebral levels.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Low lunge, rear knee down. Squeeze rear glute hard to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking. Glute-driven tilt targets psoas; passive sinking misses it entirely.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Both shins at 90°. Hinge forward over front leg with flat back — spine lengthening, not rounding. Addresses hip capsule restriction, distinct from flexor tightness.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hands in prayer to pry knees out. Hang passively at the bottom.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: On back, cross ankle above opposite knee. Pull bottom leg toward chest. Maintain flexed ankle to protect the knee joint.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. In cow, emphasize thoracic extension — lumbar extension is the default and adds nothing. Use this to close the core block.

exercises.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch — Palms-Down Gorilla
exercises.notes: Hands flat on floor, fingers pointing back toward knees, arms straight. Lean back slowly. Targets forearm extensors — equally loaded on crimps and slopers as the flexors.

exercises.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch — Palm-Up Prayer
exercises.notes: Palms together in prayer, elbows out. Then reverse: backs of hands together, fingers pointing down. Hold the sticky spots in the finger flexor tendons.

exercises.name: Lat Doorframe Stretch
exercises.notes: Grab doorframe above head height. Step through, let bodyweight traction the lat. Feel it deep along the side of the torso — not in the shoulder. Counters internal rotation bias from climbing volume.

exercises.name: Posterior Rotator Cuff Stretch
exercises.notes: Lie on side, elbow at shoulder height bent 90°. Other hand slowly rotates forearm toward floor. No forcing. Posterior capsule tightening is the most common overuse pattern in climbers.

exercises.name: Chest Opener / Pec Stretch
exercises.notes: Doorframe at 90°, lean through. Or foam roller lengthwise along spine, arms in T. Pec minor is the driver of anterior shoulder rounding in climbers.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower
events.subtitle: Core Block + Hamstrings, Adductors & Ankle
events.description: Lower nights hit the ski chain. Hamstrings, adductors, ankle dorsiflexion, and quad length. Core block first — always. Bent-knee hamstring hinge removes the sciatic nerve from the equation and isolates the muscle belly.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment at mid-thoracic. Hips stay on ground. Hands clasped behind head, elbows in. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute hard to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking. Glute-driven tilt targets psoas; passive sinking misses it.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Both shins at 90°. Hinge forward with flat back — spine lengthens, not rounds.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hands in prayer. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: On back, cross ankle above opposite knee. Pull bottom leg toward chest. Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot on elevated surface, leg slightly bent. Hinge at the hip — not rounding the spine. Bent knee isolates the muscle belly, removes sciatic nerve.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, one knee on ground, shift laterally. Critical for high steps and heel hooks in climbing, wide-stance couloir work skiing.

exercises.name: Calf / Ankle Dorsiflexion Stretch
exercises.notes: Facing wall, toes propped, lean shin forward. Insufficient dorsiflexion shifts weight back in ski boot and burns quads prematurely.

exercises.name: Kneeling Quad / Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.notes: Kneeling lunge, rear knee down. Grab rear ankle. Do NOT posteriorly tilt — let hips settle naturally. Goal is quad length, not hip flexor retraining.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Spine/Hip nights go deeper into thoracic rotation and hip external rotation. Thread-the-needle targets the most limited and most important movement plane for climbing. Pigeon drives ski turn initiation and reduces compensatory knee torque.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment, mid-thoracic. Hips on ground. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge. Spine lengthens.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow. 5 sec each direction.

exercises.name: Thread-the-Needle
exercises.notes: Quadruped. Thread one arm under body, rotate, shoulder rests on ground. Look up at ceiling on open side. Thoracic transverse rotation — allows torso to flag and counter-rotate on steep terrain.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
exercises.notes: On back, one knee drawn across body. Opposite shoulder stays flat. Look away from knee. Use prop under knee if spine won't relax. Passive — not a strength exercise.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
exercises.notes: Full pigeon: front shin on ground, torso can fold forward. Hip external rotation and glute depth. Drives ski turn initiation, reduces medial knee stress.

exercises.name: Child's Pose with Lateral Reach
exercises.notes: Kneel back to heels, walk hands to one side. Opens lat and intercostal — the space between ribs that tightens under pack weight and sustained vertical pulling.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Second upper session of the week. Forearm extensor and flexor balance reduces tendinopathy risk. Posterior capsule is the most neglected soft tissue in the climbing upper body.

exercises.notes: Both shins at 90°. Hinge forward over front leg with flat back — spine lengthening, not rounding. Addresses hip capsule restriction, distinct from flexor tightness.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hands in prayer to pry knees out. Hang passively at the bottom.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: On back, cross ankle above opposite knee. Pull bottom leg toward chest. Maintain flexed ankle to protect the knee joint.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. In cow, emphasize thoracic extension — lumbar extension is the default and adds nothing. Use this to close the core block.

exercises.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch — Palms-Down Gorilla
exercises.notes: Hands flat on floor, fingers pointing back toward knees, arms straight. Lean back slowly. Targets forearm extensors — equally loaded on crimps and slopers as the flexors.

exercises.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch — Palm-Up Prayer
exercises.notes: Palms together in prayer, elbows out. Then reverse: backs of hands together, fingers pointing down. Hold the sticky spots in the finger flexor tendons.

exercises.name: Lat Doorframe Stretch
exercises.notes: Grab doorframe above head height. Step through, let bodyweight traction the lat. Feel it deep along the side of the torso — not in the shoulder. Counters internal rotation bias from climbing volume.

exercises.name: Posterior Rotator Cuff Stretch
exercises.notes: Lie on side, elbow at shoulder height bent 90°. Other hand slowly rotates forearm toward floor. No forcing. Posterior capsule tightening is the most common overuse pattern in climbers.

exercises.name: Chest Opener / Pec Stretch
exercises.notes: Doorframe at 90°, lean through. Or foam roller lengthwise along spine, arms in T. Pec minor is the driver of anterior shoulder rounding in climbers.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower
events.subtitle: Core Block + Hamstrings, Adductors & Ankle
events.description: Lower nights hit the ski chain. Hamstrings, adductors, ankle dorsiflexion, and quad length. Core block first — always. Bent-knee hamstring hinge removes the sciatic nerve from the equation and isolates the muscle belly.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment at mid-thoracic. Hips stay on ground. Hands clasped behind head, elbows in. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute hard to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking. Glute-driven tilt targets psoas; passive sinking misses it.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Both shins at 90°. Hinge forward with flat back — spine lengthens, not rounds.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hands in prayer. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: On back, cross ankle above opposite knee. Pull bottom leg toward chest. Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot on elevated surface, leg slightly bent. Hinge at the hip — not rounding the spine. Bent knee isolates the muscle belly, removes sciatic nerve.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, one knee on ground, shift laterally. Critical for high steps and heel hooks in climbing, wide-stance couloir work skiing.

exercises.name: Calf / Ankle Dorsiflexion Stretch
exercises.notes: Facing wall, toes propped, lean shin forward. Insufficient dorsiflexion shifts weight back in ski boot and burns quads prematurely.

exercises.name: Kneeling Quad / Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.notes: Kneeling lunge, rear knee down. Grab rear ankle. Do NOT posteriorly tilt — let hips settle naturally. Goal is quad length, not hip flexor retraining.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Spine/Hip nights go deeper into thoracic rotation and hip external rotation. Thread-the-needle targets the most limited and most important movement plane for climbing. Pigeon drives ski turn initiation and reduces compensatory knee torque.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment, mid-thoracic. Hips on ground. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge. Spine lengthens.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow. 5 sec each direction.

exercises.name: Thread-the-Needle
exercises.notes: Quadruped. Thread one arm under body, rotate, shoulder rests on ground. Look up at ceiling on open side. Thoracic transverse rotation — allows torso to flag and counter-rotate on steep terrain.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
exercises.notes: On back, one knee drawn across body. Opposite shoulder stays flat. Look away from knee. Use prop under knee if spine won't relax. Passive — not a strength exercise.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
exercises.notes: Full pigeon: front shin on ground, torso can fold forward. Hip external rotation and glute depth. Drives ski turn initiation, reduces medial knee stress.

exercises.name: Child's Pose with Lateral Reach
exercises.notes: Kneel back to heels, walk hands to one side. Opens lat and intercostal — the space between ribs that tightens under pack weight and sustained vertical pulling.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Second upper session of the week. Forearm extensor and flexor balance reduces tendinopathy risk. Posterior capsule is the most neglected soft tissue in the climbing upper body.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch

exercises.name: Cat-Cow

exercises.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch — Palm-Up Prayer
exercises.notes: Prayer position, elbows out. Reverse: backs of hands together. Hold the sticky spots.

exercises.name: Lat Doorframe Stretch
exercises.notes: Feel it deep along torso, not in shoulder. Counters internal rotation bias from climbing.

exercises.name: Posterior Rotator Cuff Stretch
exercises.notes: Lie on side, elbow at shoulder height. Rotate forearm toward floor slowly. No forcing.

exercises.name: Chest Opener / Pec Stretch
exercises.notes: Doorframe at 90° or foam roller lengthwise. Pec minor is the driver of anterior shoulder rounding.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose

exercises.name: Child's Pose with Lateral Reach

events.subtitle: Core Block + 2 Lower Stretches

exercises.notes: Facing wall, toes propped, lean shin forward. Insufficient dorsiflexion shifts weight back in ski boot and burns quads prematurely.

exercises.name: Kneeling Quad / Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.notes: Kneeling lunge, rear knee down. Grab rear ankle. Do NOT posteriorly tilt — let hips settle naturally. Goal is quad length, not hip flexor retraining.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Spine/Hip nights go deeper into thoracic rotation and hip external rotation. Thread-the-needle targets the most limited and most important movement plane for climbing. Pigeon drives ski turn initiation and reduces compensatory knee torque.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment, mid-thoracic. Hips on ground. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge. Spine lengthens.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow. 5 sec each direction.

exercises.name: Thread-the-Needle
exercises.notes: Quadruped. Thread one arm under body, rotate, shoulder rests on ground. Look up at ceiling on open side. Thoracic transverse rotation — allows torso to flag and counter-rotate on steep terrain.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
exercises.notes: On back, one knee drawn across body. Opposite shoulder stays flat. Look away from knee. Use prop under knee if spine won't relax. Passive — not a strength exercise.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
exercises.notes: Full pigeon: front shin on ground, torso can fold forward. Hip external rotation and glute depth. Drives ski turn initiation, reduces medial knee stress.

exercises.name: Child's Pose with Lateral Reach
exercises.notes: Kneel back to heels, walk hands to one side. Opens lat and intercostal — the space between ribs that tightens under pack weight and sustained vertical pulling.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Second upper session of the week. Forearm extensor and flexor balance reduces tendinopathy risk. Posterior capsule is the most neglected soft tissue in the climbing upper body.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Mid-thoracic, segment by segment. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute squeeze to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch — Palms-Down Gorilla
exercises.notes: Hands flat on floor, fingers back toward knees. Lean back. Targets forearm extensors.

exercises.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch — Palm-Up Prayer
exercises.notes: Prayer position, elbows out. Reverse: backs of hands together. Hold the sticky spots.

exercises.name: Lat Doorframe Stretch
exercises.notes: Feel it deep along torso, not in shoulder. Counters internal rotation bias from climbing.

exercises.name: Posterior Rotator Cuff Stretch
exercises.notes: Lie on side, elbow at shoulder height. Rotate forearm toward floor slowly. No forcing.

exercises.name: Chest Opener / Pec Stretch
exercises.notes: Doorframe at 90° or foam roller lengthwise. Pec minor is the driver of anterior shoulder rounding.

exercises.notes: Flat back hinge.

exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot elevated, leg slightly bent. Hinge at hip. Bent knee isolates muscle belly.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally. Adductors consistently undertrained and overly tight in climbers.

exercises.name: Calf / Ankle Dorsiflexion Stretch
exercises.notes: Toes propped against wall, lean shin forward.

exercises.name: Kneeling Quad / Hip Flexor Stretch

events.description: Second spine/hip session of the week. Pigeon pose is distinct from the flexor work in the psoas lunge — it targets external hip rotation specifically, which drives ski turn initiation.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute-driven posterior tilt BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Thread-the-Needle
exercises.notes: Quadruped. Thread arm under, shoulder to ground. Look up on open side.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
exercises.notes: Opposite shoulder stays flat. Look away from knee. Passive.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
exercises.notes: Front shin on ground. Torso can fold forward over it. External hip rotation — distinct from psoas lunge.

exercises.name: Child's Pose with Lateral Reach
exercises.notes: Walk hands to one side. Targets ribs that tighten under pack weight.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower (Short)
events.subtitle: Core Block + 2 Lower Stretches
events.description: Sunday is a shortened session — intentional programming, not a concession. After 6 consecutive nights of structured stretching, reduced load is part of the plan. Core block plus the two most critical lower stretches only.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute-driven posterior tilt BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Close the core block.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot elevated. Hinge at hip, not spine.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Core block first — sequence is non-negotiable. Thoracic work precedes psoas release so the pelvis receives the benefit of a more mobile thoracic spine. Upper add-on hits climbing-critical soft tissue: forearm extensors and flexors, lat internal rotation bias, posterior capsule, and pec minor.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment at mid-thoracic. Hips stay on ground. Hands clasped behind head, elbows in. Let gravity extend you — do not force. Work 3–4 vertebral levels.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Low lunge, rear knee down. Squeeze rear glute hard to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking. Glute-driven tilt targets psoas; passive sinking misses it entirely.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Both shins at 90°. Hinge forward over front leg with flat back — spine lengthening, not rounding. Addresses hip capsule restriction, distinct from flexor tightness.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hands in prayer to pry knees out. Hang passively at the bottom.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: On back, cross ankle above opposite knee. Pull bottom leg toward chest. Maintain flexed ankle to protect the knee joint.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. In cow, emphasize thoracic extension — lumbar extension is the default and adds nothing. Use this to close the core block.

exercises.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch — Palms-Down Gorilla
exercises.notes: Hands flat on floor, fingers pointing back toward knees, arms straight. Lean back slowly. Targets forearm extensors — equally loaded on crimps and slopers as the flexors.

exercises.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch — Palm-Up Prayer
exercises.notes: Palms together in prayer, elbows out. Then reverse: backs of hands together, fingers pointing down. Hold the sticky spots in the finger flexor tendons.

exercises.name: Lat Doorframe Stretch
exercises.notes: Grab doorframe above head height. Step through, let bodyweight traction the lat. Feel it deep along the side of the torso — not in the shoulder. Counters internal rotation bias from climbing volume.

exercises.name: Posterior Rotator Cuff Stretch
exercises.notes: Lie on side, elbow at shoulder height bent 90°. Other hand slowly rotates forearm toward floor. No forcing. Posterior capsule tightening is the most common overuse pattern in climbers.

exercises.name: Chest Opener / Pec Stretch
exercises.notes: Doorframe at 90°, lean through. Or foam roller lengthwise along spine, arms in T. Pec minor is the driver of anterior shoulder rounding in climbers.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower
events.subtitle: Core Block + Hamstrings, Adductors & Ankle
events.description: Lower nights hit the ski chain. Hamstrings, adductors, ankle dorsiflexion, and quad length. Core block first — always. Bent-knee hamstring hinge removes the sciatic nerve from the equation and isolates the muscle belly.

exercises.notes: Doorframe at 90° or foam roller lengthwise. Pec minor is the driver of anterior shoulder rounding.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower (Short)
events.subtitle: Core Block + 2 Lower Stretches
events.description: Sunday is a shortened session — intentional programming, not a concession. After 6 consecutive nights of structured stretching, reduced load is part of the plan. Core block plus the two most critical lower stretches only.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute-driven posterior tilt BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Close the core block.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot elevated. Hinge at hip, not spine.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Core block first — sequence is non-negotiable. Thoracic work precedes psoas release so the pelvis receives the benefit of a more mobile thoracic spine. Upper add-on hits climbing-critical soft tissue: forearm extensors and flexors, lat internal rotation bias, posterior capsule, and pec minor.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment at mid-thoracic. Hips stay on ground. Hands clasped behind head, elbows in. Let gravity extend you — do not force. Work 3–4 vertebral levels.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Low lunge, rear knee down. Squeeze rear glute hard to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking. Glute-driven tilt targets psoas; passive sinking misses it entirely.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Both shins at 90°. Hinge forward over front leg with flat back — spine lengthening, not rounding. Addresses hip capsule restriction, distinct from flexor tightness.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hands in prayer to pry knees out. Hang passively at the bottom.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: On back, cross ankle above opposite knee. Pull bottom leg toward chest. Maintain flexed ankle to protect the knee joint.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. In cow, emphasize thoracic extension — lumbar extension is the default and adds nothing. Use this to close the core block.

exercises.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch — Palms-Down Gorilla
exercises.notes: Hands flat on floor, fingers pointing back toward knees, arms straight. Lean back slowly. Targets forearm extensors — equally loaded on crimps and slopers as the flexors.

exercises.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch — Palm-Up Prayer
exercises.notes: Palms together in prayer, elbows out. Then reverse: backs of hands together, fingers pointing down. Hold the sticky spots in the finger flexor tendons.

exercises.name: Lat Doorframe Stretch
exercises.notes: Grab doorframe above head height. Step through, let bodyweight traction the lat. Feel it deep along the side of the torso — not in the shoulder. Counters internal rotation bias from climbing volume.

exercises.name: Posterior Rotator Cuff Stretch
exercises.notes: Lie on side, elbow at shoulder height bent 90°. Other hand slowly rotates forearm toward floor. No forcing. Posterior capsule tightening is the most common overuse pattern in climbers.

exercises.name: Chest Opener / Pec Stretch
exercises.notes: Doorframe at 90°, lean through. Or foam roller lengthwise along spine, arms in T. Pec minor is the driver of anterior shoulder rounding in climbers.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower
events.subtitle: Core Block + Hamstrings, Adductors & Ankle
events.description: Lower nights hit the ski chain. Hamstrings, adductors, ankle dorsiflexion, and quad length. Core block first — always. Bent-knee hamstring hinge removes the sciatic nerve from the equation and isolates the muscle belly.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment at mid-thoracic. Hips stay on ground. Hands clasped behind head, elbows in. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute hard to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking. Glute-driven tilt targets psoas; passive sinking misses it.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Both shins at 90°. Hinge forward with flat back — spine lengthens, not rounds.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hands in prayer. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: On back, cross ankle above opposite knee. Pull bottom leg toward chest. Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot on elevated surface, leg slightly bent. Hinge at the hip — not rounding the spine. Bent knee isolates the muscle belly, removes sciatic nerve.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, one knee on ground, shift laterally. Critical for high steps and heel hooks in climbing, wide-stance couloir work skiing.

exercises.name: Calf / Ankle Dorsiflexion Stretch
exercises.notes: Facing wall, toes propped, lean shin forward. Insufficient dorsiflexion shifts weight back in ski boot and burns quads prematurely.

exercises.name: Kneeling Quad / Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.notes: Kneeling lunge, rear knee down. Grab rear ankle. Do NOT posteriorly tilt — let hips settle naturally. Goal is quad length, not hip flexor retraining.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Spine/Hip nights go deeper into thoracic rotation and hip external rotation. Thread-the-needle targets the most limited and most important movement plane for climbing. Pigeon drives ski turn initiation and reduces compensatory knee torque.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment, mid-thoracic. Hips on ground. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge. Spine lengthens.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow. 5 sec each direction.

exercises.name: Thread-the-Needle
exercises.notes: Quadruped. Thread one arm under body, rotate, shoulder rests on ground. Look up at ceiling on open side. Thoracic transverse rotation — allows torso to flag and counter-rotate on steep terrain.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
exercises.notes: On back, one knee drawn across body. Opposite shoulder stays flat. Look away from knee. Use prop under knee if spine won't relax. Passive — not a strength exercise.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
exercises.notes: Full pigeon: front shin on ground, torso can fold forward. Hip external rotation and glute depth. Drives ski turn initiation, reduces medial knee stress.

exercises.name: Child's Pose with Lateral Reach
exercises.notes: Kneel back to heels, walk hands to one side. Opens lat and intercostal — the space between ribs that tightens under pack weight and sustained vertical pulling.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Second upper session of the week. Forearm extensor and flexor balance reduces tendinopathy risk. Posterior capsule is the most neglected soft tissue in the climbing upper body.
